summary: Tested Farewell and Adopt page fixes. Verified: (1) Farewell page loads without errors, (2) Product modal opens and Add to Cart button works correctly, (3) No inappropriate products (play toys) appear on farewell/adopt pages, (4) PersonalizedPicks component correctly prevents generic fallback for sensitive pillars.
critical_code_review_comments: PersonalizedPicks.jsx (lines 310-330): Correctly prevents generic fallback for farewell/adopt pillars - shows empty rather than inappropriate products
PersonalizedPicks.jsx (lines 148-171): PILLAR_CONFIG now includes farewell and adopt with appropriate messages
FarewellPage.jsx (lines 1130-1140): Product modal Add to Cart button has correct onClick handler that calls handleAddToCart and closes modal
context_for_next_testing_agent: Farewell and Adopt pages verified working. Product modal on Farewell page now has functional Add to Cart button. PersonalizedPicks component correctly prevents inappropriate products on sensitive pillars (farewell/adopt).

verification_results.farewell_page_loads: PASS - Page loads correctly with memorial-appropriate content
verification_results.product_modal_add_to_cart: PASS - Modal opens and Add to Cart button works (verified via Playwright)
verification_results.memorial_keepsakes_add_to_cart: PASS - Direct Add button on products works with toast notification
verification_results.no_inappropriate_products_farewell: PASS - No 'play things', 'play toy', 'playtime toys', 'chew toy' found
verification_results.no_inappropriate_products_adopt: PASS - No inappropriate product terms found
verification_results.adopt_page_loads: PASS - Page loads with adoption-appropriate services
